payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a partial, edge-cropped upholstered chair back with a padded rounded top and vertical alternating burgundy and cream stripes; material appears to be glossy fabric or vinyl with slight reflections, only the upper backrest is visible in a tight crop — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
